appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed: Flet desktop app runs correctly as native macOS app (PIDs verified at port 8750). The ft.icons->ft.Icons fix (commit ddc1ba9) has been applied to all screen files. Flutter/Flet web apps cannot render in headless browser - UI assertions require manual testing or headed browser environment.
